# Auto-post social posts with PostgreSQL and WordPress at scale

**Pattern:** Social Scheduler · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Auto-post social posts with PostgreSQL and WordPress at scale. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual listening is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Weekly Schedule → Build the Brief → Draft with AI Writer → Refine with AI Editor → Publish Draft to WordPress → Tag Pipeline Metadata → Guard Non-Empty content → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to social scheduler without manual effort
- Anyone automating listening in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Standardizes the process every time
- Scales without extra headcount
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Slack OAuth2; WordPress credentials.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your listening process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
